capabilities.name: Staged sprint lifecycle + operator QA platform journeys
sharedInvariants: served frontend bundle equals dist/web bundle
exactly one verified managed LandOS server owns port 3141
operator data survives browser refresh and managed restart
QA infrastructure issues only read-only requests against operator data
browserAssertions: workspace shell renders visible LandOS content in a real browser
deal-cards API reconciles with the visible page
content persists across reload and npm run landos:restart
knownLimitations: fixture selection for property-state journeys is heuristic; journeys report fixture_unavailable when no safe match exists
mutating intake journeys require explicit --allow-mutations plus a QA fixture address and remain manual-gated
